item.title: Predicting Cervical Spine Injury in Pediatric Trauma Patients
Prediction of cervical spine injury in young pediatric patients: an optimal trees artificial intelligence approach
item.description: Further details on your publication can be written here using Markdown for formatting. This text will be displayed on the Publication Detail page.
